weaknesses.name: fabricated-specifics
weaknesses.audit_instruction: Scrutinize for 'fabricated-specifics'. State only specifics confirmable in evidence. If present and unsupported by evidence -> DIRTY.

weaknesses.name: overconfident-no-source
weaknesses.audit_instruction: Scrutinize for 'overconfident-no-source'. Demand a source for quantitative claims. If present and unsupported by evidence -> DIRTY.

weaknesses.name: empty-hedge
weaknesses.audit_instruction: Scrutinize for 'empty-hedge'. Reject vacuous hedges. If present and unsupported by evidence -> DIRTY.
